privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated JStock portfolio data where AAPL has a Purchase Value of 18520.0 and MSFT has 18725.0 (both exceeding the 16000.0 threshold), making them targets for the exact 'High Value - Review Quarterly' comment. NVDA has a Purchase Value of 15382.5 (below the threshold) and must remain unannotated.
